name: ask_user.lua
description: Ask the user one or more questions with selectable options or custom answers. Use the 'questions' array to ask several questions back-to-back in a single call, or use top-level 'question' + 'options' for a single question.

name: browser.lua
description: The web task to complete, in plain language. Be specific about what to do and what to return.

name: cron.lua
description: Manage Bone scheduled jobs for the user. Use this when the user asks to schedule, list, remove, or inspect recurring Bone tasks. Fully implemented as a custom tool; supports daily HH:MM schedules.

name: subagent.lua
description: dispatch (start tasks), wait (block for results), cancel (stop jobs by id), or status (non-blocking snapshot)

name: task_list.lua
description: Maintain a visible checklist (TUI pane) for the user. Use it for any task with ~3+ distinct steps or work spanning multiple files. Call 'write' with the FULL list every time — it replaces the whole list, so there are no indices to track. Keep exactly one item 'in_progress' (the step you're working on now) and flip items to 'done' the moment they're finished, then write again. State is host-held; no state arg. Actions: write (pass tasks, optional name, max 15), clear.

name: web_search.lua
description: Search the web for information using DuckDuckGo. Returns titles, URLs and summaries. Useful for looking up documentation, current events, technical topics, and general knowledge.

name: goal.lua
description: Start, resume, check, or stop an autonomous goal.

name: history.lua
description: Pick a recent conversation and load it as the current chat.

name: memory.lua
description: Incremental memory builder. Processes all conversations since last run and updates memory.md.

name: review.lua
description: Review unstaged changes for bugs, smells, dead code, and clean code

name: shotgun.lua
description: Fan a prompt out to configured providers; the chat agent synthesizes the answers
